_provenance: schema-derived from V1 mandate AC-V1 (feature-plans/engine-correctness-remediation.md §V1, lines 66-70) and autotuner.py save_autotune_run signature
_scope: V1 calibration sweep report: per-symphony recommendation for PARABOLIC_VELOCITY_THRESHOLD and VWAP_CROSS_HWM_PCT only
_assertion_strategy: assert required keys present; assert numeric fields are finite floats; assert delta_pct derivable from current_value and proposed_value; never assert specific computed values

field_types.delta_pct: float — must equal (proposed_value - current_value) / abs(current_value) * 100 when current_value != 0
field_types.frozen_eval_alpha: float or null — None indicates frozen fold produced no triggers
field_types.selection_tstat: float or null — Harvey & Liu 2015 haircut winner's selection t-statistic (D3; replaced the deleted deflated_sharpe). null when no trial cleared the FDR gate or the haircut did not run — disambiguated by haircut_outcome
field_types.haircut_outcome: str — explicit FDR-gate verdict, one of {cleared, no_trial_cleared, not_run}. Disambiguates selection_tstat=None so the operator reads the gate result, not a blank. risk-engine-specialist trace + team-lead branch-2 ruling 2026-05-22
